questions.question: The author says it is impossible for the blood of what animals to take away sins?
questions.feedback: It is impossible for the blood of bulls and goats to take away sins.

questions.question: After offering one sacrifice for sins, Christ did what?
options: Sat down at the right hand of God
questions.correct: Sat down at the right hand of God
questions.feedback: After one sacrifice for sins forever, Christ sat down at the right hand of God.

questions.question: The author encourages believers to keep meeting together.
questions.feedback: Do not give up meeting together, as some are in the habit of doing.

questions.question: Let us hold unswervingly to the _____ we profess, for he who promised is faithful.
questions.feedback: Hold unswervingly to the hope we profess.

questions.question: It is a fearful thing to fall into the hands of the _____ God.
questions.feedback: It is a fearful thing to fall into the hands of the living God.
